name: videos
description: Remotion compositions that repurpose the docs homepage demos as social/blog videos

scripts.render:all: remotion render Showreel out/showreel.mp4 && remotion render Cart out/cart.mp4 && remotion render AgentMarkets out/agent-markets.mp4 && remotion render AgentAuth out/agent-auth.mp4 && remotion render AgentCMS out/agent-cms.mp4 && remotion render ContentNegotiation out/content-negotiation.mp4 && remotion render Assistant out/assistant.mp4
scripts.render:full: remotion render Showreel out/full/showreel.mp4 --props='{"layout":"full"}' && remotion render Cart out/full/cart.mp4 --props='{"layout":"full"}' && remotion render AgentMarkets out/full/agent-markets.mp4 --props='{"layout":"full"}' && remotion render AgentAuth out/full/agent-auth.mp4 --props='{"layout":"full"}' && remotion render AgentCMS out/full/agent-cms.mp4 --props='{"layout":"full"}' && remotion render ContentNegotiation out/full/content-negotiation.mp4 --props='{"layout":"full"}' && remotion render Assistant out/full/assistant.mp4 --props='{"layout":"full"}'
